chunks.text: ORDER SHEET THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI C.P. No. D-3194 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE PRIORITY. 1. For hearing of Misc. No.13791 of 2025 (Stay) 2. For hearing of main case. 11.07.2025 Mr. Muhammad Faisal Qasim, Advocate for the Petitioner. --------------------- Mr. Sardar Zafar Hussain, Advocate files Vakalatnama for Respondent No.2, which is taken o record. Counsel for the Petitioner has placed on record a copy of the Notice along with the Statement, which is taken on record. He submits that the Petitioner is ready to pay Taxable amount; however, he seeks 15 days’ time for this purpose. This proposal has not been opposed by the learned counsel for the Respondent No.2. In view of the above, this Petition is disposed of with a direction to pay the Taxable amount within 15 days. In case of failure, the Department shall be at liberty to initiate proceedings in accordance with the law. JUDGE JUDGE Jamil
